title: CRISIS AND EMERGENCY PREPAREDNESS - 211info
text: BURNS CRISIS AND EMERGENCY PREPAREDNESS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Coordinates with local, state, and federal agencies to facilitate emergency preparedness training and community education and outreach. Provides wraparound social services, prevention kits, and emergency food and financial assistance. 51 W Washington Burns, OR 97720 Eligibility: Varies by service. Emergency financial assistance must be directly impacted by COVID-19. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (541) 370-2810 401 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 370-2810 Ext: 401 Main phone (844) 370-2810 Toll-free Main phone (541) 370-2810 ext 401 Toll-free (844) 370-2810 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Baker, Gilliam, Grant, Harney, Hood River, Malheur, Morrow, Sherman, Umatilla, Union, Wallowa, Wasco, and Wheeler Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Services: Disaster Related Case Management * Disaster/Emergency Issues Food Pantries * Disaster/Emergency Issues Personal Preparedness Equipment/Supplies * Disaster/Emergency Issues Undesignated Temporary Financial Assistance * Disaster/Emergency Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HIV COMMUNITY SERVICES INFORMATION SERVICES - INFORMATION SERVICES PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - TRANSITION SERVICES REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - CENTERS FOR INDEPENDENT LIVING SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - NEEDLE EXCHANGE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BURNS
